mapper.select: SELECT COUNT(1) FROM sys_user WHERE deleted = 0
SELECT COUNT(1) FROM biz_student WHERE deleted = 0
SELECT COUNT(1) FROM biz_teacher WHERE deleted = 0
SELECT COUNT(1) FROM biz_course WHERE deleted = 0
SELECT COUNT(1) FROM biz_application WHERE deleted = 0 AND status = 0

SELECT id, title, type, status, DATE_FORMAT(created_at, '%Y-%m-%d %H:%i:%s') AS createdAt FROM ( SELECT CONCAT('application-', a.id) AS id, CONCAT('待审核申请：', a.application_type, ' / ', COALESCE(a.target_name, '未指定对象')) AS title, '审批单' AS type, '待审核' AS status, a.submit_time AS created_at FROM biz_application a WHERE a.deleted = 0 AND a.status = 0
UNION ALL
SELECT CONCAT('student-', s.id) AS id, CONCAT('学生档案待绑定账号：', s.student_name) AS title, '学生档案' AS type, '待处理' AS status, s.created_at FROM biz_student s WHERE s.deleted = 0 AND (s.user_id IS NULL OR s.user_id = 0)
UNION ALL
SELECT CONCAT('teacher-', t.id) AS id, CONCAT('教师档案待绑定账号：', t.teacher_name) AS title, '教师档案' AS type, '待处理' AS status, t.created_at FROM biz_teacher t WHERE t.deleted = 0 AND (t.user_id IS NULL OR t.user_id = 0)
UNION ALL
SELECT CONCAT('user-', u.id) AS id, CONCAT('用户待分配角色：', u.real_name) AS title, '用户账号' AS type, '待处理' AS status, u.created_at FROM sys_user u WHERE u.deleted = 0 AND NOT EXISTS ( SELECT 1 FROM sys_user_role ur WHERE ur.user_id = u.id ) ) pending_list ORDER BY created_at DESC, id DESC LIMIT #{limit}

SELECT d.dept_name AS name, ( COALESCE(u.user_count, 0) + COALESCE(s.student_count, 0) + COALESCE(t.teacher_count, 0) ) AS value FROM sys_department d LEFT JOIN ( SELECT dept_id, COUNT(1) AS user_count FROM sys_user WHERE deleted = 0 GROUP BY dept_id ) u ON u.dept_id = d.id LEFT JOIN ( SELECT dept_id, COUNT(1) AS student_count FROM biz_student WHERE deleted = 0 GROUP BY dept_id ) s ON s.dept_id = d.id LEFT JOIN ( SELECT dept_id, COUNT(1) AS teacher_count FROM biz_teacher WHERE deleted = 0 GROUP BY dept_id ) t ON t.dept_id = d.id WHERE d.deleted = 0 AND ( COALESCE(u.user_count, 0) + COALESCE(s.student_count, 0) + COALESCE(t.teacher_count, 0) ) > 0 ORDER BY value DESC, d.sort_no ASC, d.id ASC

SELECT DATE_FORMAT(days.stat_date, '%Y-%m-%d') AS date, COALESCE(stats.application_count, 0) AS count FROM ( SELECT CURDATE() - INTERVAL 6 DAY AS stat_date UNION ALL SELECT CURDATE() - INTERVAL 5 DAY UNION ALL SELECT CURDATE() - INTERVAL 4 DAY UNION ALL SELECT CURDATE() - INTERVAL 3 DAY UNION ALL SELECT CURDATE() - INTERVAL 2 DAY UNION ALL SELECT CURDATE() - INTERVAL 1 DAY UNION ALL SELECT CURDATE() ) days LEFT JOIN ( SELECT DATE(submit_time) AS submit_date, COUNT(1) AS application_count FROM biz_application WHERE deleted = 0 AND submit_time >= CURDATE() - INTERVAL 6 DAY GROUP BY DATE(submit_time) ) stats ON stats.submit_date = days.stat_date ORDER BY days.stat_date ASC
